      <!DOCTYPE html>
      <html lang="ko">
      <head>
      <meta charset="utf-8">
      <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
      <title>모소밤부 UNIVERSE — 투자테제 연결망</title>
      <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/d3/7.8.5/d3.min.js"></script>
      <style>
      *{box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
      :root{--bg:#0b110c;--bg2:#070b08;--ink:#E9F2DD;--sub:#8FA889;--line:#26371f;
      --green:#9AD36B;--green-d:#76B84A;--leaf:#B6E36B;--gold:#E0C36B;--panel:#101810;--panelb:#26371f;}
      html,body{margin:0;height:100%;background:var(--bg);color:var(--ink);
      font-family:"Pretendard","Apple SD Gothic Neo","Nanum Gothic","Malgun Gothic",-apple-system,system-ui,sans-serif;overflow:hidden}
      #app{position:fixed;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
      header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:11px 16px;background:rgba(11,17,12,.92);
      border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);z-index:20;backdrop-filter:blur(6px)}
      .brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;white-space:nowrap}
      header h1{font-size:15px;margin:0;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.3px;color:var(--ink)}
      header h1 span{color:var(--leaf)}
      #search{flex:1;max-width:360px;background:#0d150d;border:1px solid var(--panelb);color:var(--ink);
      border-radius:999px;padding:9px 16px;font-size:14px;outline:none}
      #search::placeholder{color:#6E8268}
      #search:focus{border-color:var(--green);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(154,211,107,.15)}
      .hbtn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;white-space:nowrap;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;
      font-size:13px;font-weight:700;padding:8px 13px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid var(--panelb);background:#14200f;color:var(--leaf)}
      .hbtn:hover{border-color:var(--green);background:#1b2a10}
      .hbtn.solid{background:var(--green);color:#0b110c;border-color:var(--leaf);font-weight:800}
      .hbtn.solid:hover{background:var(--leaf)}
      .hint{font-size:11px;color:var(--sub);white-space:nowrap}
      @media(max-width:820px){.hint{display:none}header h1{font-size:13px}.hbtn span{display:none}.hbtn{padding:8px 10px}}
      #stage{flex:1;position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:radial-gradient(140% 100% at 50% 0%,#10180f 0%,var(--bg) 55%,var(--bg2) 100%)}
      #bg-bamboo{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;opacity:.3}
      svg#svg{width:100%;height:100%;display:block;cursor:grab;touch-action:none;position:relative}
      svg#svg.grab:active{cursor:grabbing}
      .lk{stroke:#3f5e33;fill:none}.lk.dt{stroke:#557a3f}.lk.dd{stroke:#7FB04A}
      .node-c{cursor:pointer}
      .lbl{font-weight:700;paint-order:stroke;stroke:#0b110c;stroke-width:3.5px;fill:var(--ink);pointer-events:none;user-select:none}
      .lbl.dom{font-weight:800;fill:#EAF5DC}
      #kwbar{position:absolute;top:10px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:12;display:flex;gap:6px;
      max-width:92%;overflow-x:auto;padding:4px;scrollbar-width:none}
      #kwbar::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
      .kw{white-space:nowrap;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;padding:6px 12px;border-radius:999px;
      background:rgba(16,24,16,.82);border:1px solid var(--line);color:var(--leaf)}
      .kw:hover{border-color:var(--green);background:#1b2a10}
      #panel{position:absolute;top:0;right:0;height:100%;width:384px;max-width:88vw;background:var(--panel);
      border-left:1px solid var(--panelb);transform:translateX(100%);box-shadow:-8px 0 36px rgba(0,0,0,.4);
      transition:transform .28s cubic-bezier(.3,.7,.3,1);z-index:30;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
      #panel.open{transform:translateX(0)}
      #panel .ph{padding:15px 18px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--panelb);background:linear-gradient(180deg,#152013,#101810);position:relative}
      #panel .crumb{font-size:11px;color:var(--sub);margin-bottom:6px;padding-right:60px}
      #panel .ptitle{font-size:18px;font-weight:800;margin:0;line-height:1.3;color:var(--leaf);padding-right:60px}
      #panel .pcount{font-size:12px;color:var(--green);margin-top:6px;font-weight:600}
      #panel .plist{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:8px 10px 28px}
      .pitem{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;padding:9px 10px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid transparent;border-left:3px solid transparent}
      .pitem:hover{background:#16210f;border-color:var(--panelb);border-left-color:var(--green)}
      .plink{flex:1;min-width:0;text-decoration:none;color:var(--ink)}
      .plink .pt{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;line-height:1.42}
      .plink .pd{font-size:11px;color:var(--sub);margin-top:3px}
      .pitem.read{opacity:.55}.pitem.read .plink .pt::before{content:'✓ ';color:var(--green);font-weight:800}
      .rk{color:var(--gold);font-weight:800;margin-right:4px}
      .pacts{display:flex;gap:3px;flex:none}
      .pact{width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:7px;border:1px solid var(--panelb);background:#14200f;color:#6E8268;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;line-height:1;padding:0}
      .pact:hover{border-color:var(--green);color:var(--leaf)}
      .pact.on{background:#22330f;color:var(--leaf);border-color:var(--green)}
      .boxtab{display:inline-block;margin:0 6px 0 0;padding:7px 12px;background:#14200f;border:1px solid var(--panelb);border-radius:999px;font-size:12.5px;color:var(--sub);cursor:pointer;font-weight:600}
      .boxtab.on{background:#22330f;border-color:var(--green);color:var(--leaf)}
      #plegend{padding:7px 16px;font-size:11px;color:var(--sub);border-bottom:1px solid var(--panelb);background:#0d150d}
      #plegend b{color:var(--leaf);font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap}
      .pact-scrap.on{color:#E0C36B;border-color:#E0C36B;background:#2a2410}
      .pitem.seen{opacity:.6}
      #profile .ocard{max-height:88vh;overflow:auto}
      #modesw{position:absolute;top:10px;left:14px;z-index:13;display:flex;background:rgba(16,24,16,.85);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:999px;padding:3px}
      #modesw button{border:none;background:none;color:var(--sub);font-size:12.5px;font-weight:700;padding:6px 12px;border-radius:999px;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap}
      #modesw button.on{background:var(--green);color:#0b110c}
      #challenge{position:absolute;left:50%;bottom:58px;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:35;width:340px;max-width:92%;background:#101810;border:1px solid var(--green);border-radius:14px;padding:13px 15px;box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}
      #challenge .ch-t{font-size:13px;font-weight:800;color:var(--leaf);margin-bottom:3px}
      #challenge .ch-s{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--sub);margin-bottom:9px;line-height:1.5}
      #challenge .ch-bar{height:8px;background:#1a280f;border-radius:999px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:10px}
      #challenge .ch-bar>div{height:100%;background:var(--green);transition:width .4s}
      #challenge .ch-btns{display:flex;gap:8px}
      #challenge .ch-btns button{flex:1;border:1px solid var(--panelb);background:#16210f;color:var(--leaf);border-radius:8px;padding:8px;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer}
      #challenge .ch-btns button.gho{color:var(--sub);background:none}
      .pbtns{position:absolute;top:13px;right:12px;display:flex;gap:6px}
      .pbtns button{background:#1a280f;border:1px solid var(--panelb);color:var(--leaf);border-radius:8px;width:30px;height:30px;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer}
      .pbtns button:hover{border-color:var(--green)}
      .thchip{display:inline-block;margin:4px 6px 0 0;padding:6px 11px;background:#1a280f;border:1px solid #33491f;
      border-radius:999px;font-size:12px;color:var(--leaf);cursor:pointer;font-weight:600}
      .thchip:hover{border-color:var(--green);background:#22330f}
      .thchip b{color:var(--green);font-weight:800;margin-left:5px}
      .tcard{display:block;text-decoration:none;color:var(--ink);background:#16210f;border:1px solid var(--panelb);
      border-radius:12px;padding:13px 14px;margin:8px 6px;cursor:pointer}
      .tcard:hover{border-color:var(--green)}
      .tcard .tt{font-size:14.5px;font-weight:800;color:var(--leaf)}
      .tcard .td{font-size:12px;color:var(--sub);margin-top:4px}
      #foot{position:absolute;left:14px;bottom:12px;font-size:11px;color:var(--sub);z-index:10;max-width:58%;
      background:rgba(11,17,12,.7);padding:7px 11px;border-radius:9px;border:1px solid var(--line);line-height:1.5}
      #foot b{color:var(--ink)}#foot a{color:var(--green);cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline}
      #ctrls{position:absolute;right:14px;bottom:12px;z-index:10;display:flex;gap:6px}
      #ctrls button{background:rgba(16,24,16,.85);border:1px solid var(--line);color:var(--leaf);
      width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:8px;font-size:15px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:700}
      #ctrls button:hover{background:#1a280f;border-color:var(--green)}
      #toast{position:absolute;left:50%;bottom:64px;transform:translateX(-50%);background:var(--green);color:#0b110c;
      font-size:13px;font-weight:700;padding:9px 16px;border-radius:999px;z-index:50;opacity:0;transition:opacity .25s;pointer-events:none}
      #toast.show{opacity:1}
      .overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.6);z-index:40;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px}
      .ocard{background:#101810;max-width:480px;width:100%;border-radius:16px;padding:24px 26px;border:1px solid var(--panelb)}
      .ocard h2{margin:0 0 6px;color:var(--leaf);font-size:21px}
      .ocard h2 span{color:var(--ink)}
      .ocard p{font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.7;color:var(--ink);margin:0 0 14px}
      .ocard .kwrow{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:7px;margin:0 0 18px}
      .ocard .obtns{display:flex;gap:9px;flex-wrap:wrap}
      .obtn{flex:1;min-width:130px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;font-size:14px;font-weight:800;
      padding:12px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--panelb);background:#16210f;color:var(--leaf)}
      .obtn.primary{background:var(--green);color:#0b110c;border-color:var(--leaf)}
      .obtn:hover{border-color:var(--green)}
      .mcard p{font-size:13px;line-height:1.7;color:var(--ink);margin:0 0 10px}
      .mclose{margin-top:8px;background:var(--green);color:#0b110c;border:none;border-radius:8px;padding:9px 16px;font-size:13px;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer}
      @media(max-width:760px){#panel{width:100%;max-width:100%;height:68%;top:auto;bottom:0;border-left:none;
      border-top:1px solid var(--panelb);border-radius:18px 18px 0 0;transform:translateY(100%)}
      #panel.open{transform:translateY(0)}#foot{max-width:80%}}
      .mbtag{display:inline-block;font-size:9.5px;font-weight:800;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:999px;background:#1b2a10;color:var(--leaf);border:1px solid var(--panelb);margin-left:4px;vertical-align:middle}.mbtag.bdy{background:#2a2410;color:var(--gold);border-color:#4a3f18}.msnip{font-size:11.5px;color:#A8C39A;margin-top:4px;line-height:1.5}.msnip b{color:var(--leaf);font-weight:800;background:rgba(154,211,107,.14)}.srchbar{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;padding:8px 10px;margin-bottom:6px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--panelb);position:sticky;top:0;background:var(--panel);z-index:3}.srchbar>span{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--sub);font-weight:600}.srchbar button{cursor:pointer;font-size:11.5px;font-weight:800;padding:6px 11px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid var(--green);background:#14200f;color:var(--leaf)}.srchbar button:hover{background:#1b2a10}.srchbar button:disabled{opacity:.6;cursor:default}.srchbar .bdone{font-size:11px;color:var(--gold);font-weight:700}
      </style>
      </head>
      <body>
      <div id="app">
      <header>
      <div class="brand">
      <svg width="18" height="22" viewBox="0 0 18 22"><g fill="none" stroke="#9AD36B" stroke-width="2">
      <line x1="6" y1="2" x2="6" y2="20"/><line x1="12" y1="2" x2="12" y2="20"/>
      <line x1="4.5" y1="7" x2="7.5" y2="7"/><line x1="4.5" y1="13" x2="7.5" y2="13"/>
      <line x1="10.5" y1="5" x2="13.5" y2="5"/><line x1="10.5" y1="11" x2="13.5" y2="11"/><line x1="10.5" y1="17" x2="13.5" y2="17"/></g>
      <path d="M12 6 q5 -1 5 3 q-4 1 -5 -3z" fill="#B6E36B"/></svg>
      <h1>모소밤부 <span>UNIVERSE</span></h1>
      </div>
      <input id="search" placeholder="🔍 제목·내용으로 글 검색">
      <button class="hbtn" id="levelbtn">🏅<span> 내 레벨</span></button>
      <button class="hbtn" id="boxbtn">📥<span> 보관함</span></button>
      <button class="hbtn" id="hotbtn">🔥<span>추천글</span></button>
      <button class="hbtn" id="trailbtn">📚<span>추천 경로</span></button>
      <a class="hbtn" id="subbtn" href="https://section.blog.naver.com/connect/PopConnectBuddyAddForm.nhn?blogId=bambooinvesting" target="_blank" rel="noopener">＋<span>이웃추가</span></a>
      <a class="hbtn solid" href="https://blog.naver.com/bambooinvesting" target="_blank" rel="noopener">블로그<span> ↗</span></a>
      </header>
      <div id="stage">
      <svg id="bg-bamboo" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" viewBox="0 0 1200 800"></svg>
      <svg id="svg"></svg>
      <div id="kwbar"></div>
      <div id="modesw"><button data-mode="browse">👁 둘러보기</button><button data-mode="study">📖 제대로 읽기</button></div>
      <div id="challenge" style="display:none"></div>
      <div id="foot">모소밤부 · <b id="ptotal">0</b>편 (2025.01~2026.06) &nbsp;·&nbsp; © 모소밤부. 비상업적 — <a id="liclink">저작권</a></div>
      <div id="ctrls"><button id="dice" title="랜덤 테제">🎲</button><button id="zin">+</button><button id="zout">−</button><button id="zfit">⤢</button></div>
      <div id="toast"></div>

      <h2>모소밤부 <span>UNIVERSE</span></h2>
      <p>모소밤부 블로그 글 <b id="introtot">1,054</b>편을 <b>10개 대주제 · 60여 개 테제</b>로 엮은 지도입니다.
      궁금한 주제의 노드를 누르면 관련 글이 펼쳐지고, 클릭하면 블로그로 이동합니다.</p>

      <h3 style="margin:0 0 10px;color:var(--leaf);font-size:16px">저작권 및 이용 안내</h3>
      <p>본 「모소밤부 UNIVERSE」와 연결된 모든 글의 저작권은 <b>모소밤부(blog.naver.com/bambooinvesting)</b>에 있습니다.</p>
      <p>· 개인적·비상업적 열람·공유는 자유롭게 허용합니다.<br>· <b>상업적 이용을 금지</b>합니다.<br>· 인용 시 출처(모소밤부)를 표기해 주세요.<br>· 본 자료는 정보 제공용이며 투자 권유·자문이 아닙니다.</p>

"2026.03.18", "v": 5747, "th": "사업·삶·커리어 · 사업·창업가 정신"}, {"t": "부자와 빈자가 친구가 될 수 없는 진짜 이유", "u": "http://blog.naver.com/bambooinvesting/224068419295", "d": "2025.11.07", "v": 5173, "th": "사업·삶·커리어 · 인생관·통찰"}]}, {"title": "투자 철학 인기글", "desc": "투자 철학·단상 조회수 상위", "items": [{"t": "투자 공부할수록 돈을 잃는 이유", "u": "http://blog.naver.com/bambooinvesting/224047870983", "d": "2025.10.21", "v": 13753, "th": "투자 철학·단상 · 부의 축적·복리"}, {"t": "내가 인사이트를 얻는 방법", "u": "http://blog.naver.com/bambooinvesting/224225552512", "d": "2026.03.22", "v": 7654, "th": "투자 철학·단상 · 기타"}, {"t": "매일 100개의 리포트를 읽어도 돈을 못 버는 이유", "u": "http://blog.naver.com/bambooinvesting/224100915746", "d": "2025.12.07", "v": 6359, "th": "투자 철학·단상 · 부의 축적·복리"}, {"t": "부자가 되지 못하는 것은 죄인가", "u": "http://blog.naver.com/bambooinvesting/224245753102", "d": "2026.04.09", "v": 5537, "th": "투자 철학·단상 · 부의 축적·복리"}]}];</script>
      <script>
      const NODES=PAYLOAD.nodes.map(d=>Object.assign({},d));
      const LINKS=PAYLOAD.links.map(l=>({source:l.s,target:l.t,k:l.k,w:l.w}));
      const PAL=["#9AD36B","#5FD0A0","#56C2C2","#BFD957","#6FCF97","#B79BE0","#E0C36B","#E0A36B","#5BB3A6","#E08C9A"];
      document.getElementById('ptotal').textContent=PAYLOAD.total.toLocaleString();
      document.getElementById('introtot').textContent=PAYLOAD.total.toLocaleString();
      const colorOf=d=>PAL[d.di%PAL.length];
      const sizeOf=d=>d.kind==='domain'?Math.max(22,Math.min(44,16+Math.sqrt(d.freq)*1.8)):Math.max(7,Math.min(21,5+Math.sqrt(d.freq)*1.7));
      const deg={};NODES.forEach(n=>deg[n.id]=0);
      PAYLOAD.links.forEach(l=>{if(l.k==='tt'){deg[l.s]=(deg[l.s]||0)+1;deg[l.t]=(deg[l.t]||0)+1;}});
      const hubIds=new Set(NODES.filter(n=>n.kind==='thesis').sort((a,b)=>deg[b.id]-deg[a.id]).slice(0,6).map(n=>n.id));
      function setOf(k){try{return new Set(JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(k)||'[]'));}catch(e){return new Set();}}
      function saveSet(k,s){try{localStorage.setItem(k,JSON.stringify([...s]));}catch(e){}}
      const READ=setOf('mb_read'),LATER=setOf('mb_later'),SCRAP=setOf('mb_scrap'),VISITED=setOf('mb_visited');
      let MODE=localStorage.getItem('mb_mode')||'browse';
      function markRead(u){if(!u)return;READ.add(u);saveSet('mb_read',READ);}
      function toggleSet(s,k,u){if(s.has(u))s.delete(u);else s.add(u);saveSet(k,s);}
      const svg=d3.select('#svg'),stage=document.getElementById('stage');
      let W=stage.clientWidth,H=stage.clientHeight;
      const root=svg.append('g');
      const gLink=root.append('g'),gNode=root.append('g'),gLbl=root.append('g');
      const zoom=d3.zoom().scaleExtent([0.2,3]).on('zoom',e=>root.attr('transform',e.transform));
      svg.call(zoom).classed('grab',true).on('dblclick.zoom',null);
      const link=gLink.selectAll('path').data(LINKS).join('path').attr('class',d=>'lk '+d.k)
      .attr('stroke-width',d=>d.k==='dd'?Math.max(1.6,Math.min(4.5,Math.sqrt(d.w)*.28)):d.k==='dt'?1.2:Math.max(.5,Math.min(2.6,Math.sqrt(d.w)*.45)))
      .attr('stroke-opacity',d=>d.k==='dd'?.55:d.k==='dt'?.45:.2);
      const node=gNode.selectAll('g').data(NODES).join('g').attr('class','node-c');
      node.filter(d=>d.kind==='thesis'&&hubIds.has(d.id)).append('circle').attr('r',d=>sizeOf(d)+4)
      .attr('fill','none').attr('stroke','#E0C36B').attr('stroke-width',1.8).attr('stroke-opacity',.9).attr('pointer-events','none');
      node.append('circle').attr('r',sizeOf).attr('fill',d=>d.kind==='domain'?colorOf(d):'#0e160e')
      .attr('stroke',d=>colorOf(d)).attr('stroke-width',d=>d.kind==='domain'?2:2.5);
      node.filter(d=>d.kind==='thesis').append('circle').attr('r',d=>Math.max(2.5,sizeOf(d)-5))
      .attr('fill',d=>colorOf(d)).attr('fill-opacity',.55).attr('pointer-events','none');
      node.filter(d=>d.kind==='domain').append('text').attr('text-anchor','middle').attr('dy',4)
      .attr('font-size',11).attr('font-weight',800).attr('fill','#0b110c').attr('pointer-events','none').text(d=>d.freq);
      const label=gLbl.selectAll('text').data(NODES).join('text').attr('class',d=>'lbl '+(d.kind==='domain'?'dom':''))
      .attr('text-anchor','middle').attr('font-size',d=>d.kind==='domain'?13.5:11).attr('dy',d=>sizeOf(d)+15)
      .text(d=>d.kind==='domain'?d.label:(hubIds.has(d.id)?'🔥 '+d.label:d.label))
      .attr('display',d=>(d.kind==='domain'||hubIds.has(d.id))?null:'none');
      const sim=d3.forceSimulation(NODES)
      .force('link',d3.forceLink(LINKS).id(d=>d.id).distance(l=>l.k==='dd'?165:l.k==='dt'?92:185).strength(l=>l.k==='dd'?.35:l.k==='dt'?.28:Math.min(.3,l.w*.012)))
      .force('charge',d3.forceManyBody().strength(d=>d.kind==='domain'?-1700:-420))
      .force('collide',d3.forceCollide().radius(d=>sizeOf(d)+14))
      .force('x',d3.forceX(W/2).strength(.022)).force('y',d3.forceY(H/2).strength(.022)).alpha(1).alphaDecay(.02);
      function ticked(){
      link.attr('d',d=>{const x1=d.source.x,y1=d.source.y,x2=d.target.x,y2=d.target.y;const dr=Math.hypot(x2-x1,y2-y1)*1.7;return `M${x1},${y1}A${dr},${dr} 0 0,1 ${x2},${y2}`;});
      node.attr('transform',d=>`translate(${d.x},${d.y})`);label.attr('x',d=>d.x).attr('y',d=>d.y);}
      sim.on('tick',ticked);
      for(var _i=0;_i<260;_i++)sim.tick();ticked();
      node.call(d3.drag().on('start',(e,d)=>{if(!e.active)sim.alphaTarget(.3).restart();d.fx=d.x;d.fy=d.y;})
      .on('drag',(e,d)=>{d.fx=e.x;d.fy=e.y;}).on('end',(e,d)=>{if(!e.active)sim.alphaTarget(0);d.fx=null;d.fy=null;}));
      const adj={};NODES.forEach(n=>adj[n.id]=new Set());
      LINKS.forEach(l=>{adj[l.source.id||l.source].add(l.target.id||l.target);adj[l.target.id||l.target].add(l.source.id||l.source);});
      const byId=id=>NODES.find(n=>n.id===id);
      let selId=null;
      function highlight(ids){const on=ids&&ids.size;
      node.attr('opacity',d=>!on||ids.has(d.id)?1:.1);
      label.attr('display',d=>(d.kind==='domain'||hubIds.has(d.id))?((!on||ids.has(d.id))?null:'none'):(on&&ids.has(d.id)?null:'none')).attr('opacity',d=>!on||ids.has(d.id)?1:.12);
      link.attr('stroke-opacity',d=>{const a=d.source.id,b=d.target.id;if(!on)return d.k==='dd'?.55:d.k==='dt'?.45:.2;return ids.has(a)&&ids.has(b)?(d.k==='tt'?.7:.85):.03;});}
      function clearHi(){highlight(null);}
      node.on('mouseenter',(e,d)=>{if(selId)return;highlight(new Set([d.id,...adj[d.id]]));}).on('mouseleave',()=>{if(!selId)clearHi();});
      node.on('click',(e,d)=>{e.stopPropagation();focusNode(d);});
      svg.on('click',()=>{selId=null;clearHi();closePanel();setHash('');});
      function focusNode(d){selId=d.id;highlight(new Set([d.id,...adj[d.id]]));if(d.kind==='domain')openDomain(d);else openThesis(d);}
      const panel=document.getElementById('panel'),crumb=document.getElementById('crumb'),ptitle=document.getElementById('ptitle'),pcount=document.getElementById('pcount'),plist=document.getElementById('plist');
      function openPanel(){panel.classList.add('open');}function closePanel(){panel.classList.remove('open');}
      document.getElementById('close').onclick=()=>{closePanel();selId=null;clearHi();setHash('');};
      const domName=di=>PAYLOAD.order[di];
      const thesesOf=di=>NODES.filter(n=>n.kind==='thesis'&&n.di===di);
      function openDomain(d){openPanel();setHash('d-'+d.id);crumb.textContent='대주제';ptitle.textContent=d.label;
      const ths=thesesOf(d.di);pcount.textContent=d.freq.toLocaleString()+'편 · '+ths.length+'개 세부 테제';
      plist.innerHTML='<div style="padding:6px 6px 14px">'+ths.map(t=>`<span class="thchip" data-id="${t.id}">${hubIds.has(t.id)?'🔥 ':''}${esc(t.label)}<b>${t.freq}</b></span>`).join('')+
      '</div><div style="padding:0 8px"><div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--sub);margin:4px 0 8px">최근 글</div></div>';
      const seen={},m=[];ths.forEach(t=>t.posts.forEach(p=>{if(!seen[p.u]){seen[p.u]=1;m.push(p);}}));m.sort((a,b)=>a.d<b.d?1:-1);
      plist.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend',m.slice(0,40).map(postHTML).join(''));
      bindChips();}
      function openThesis(t){openPanel();setHash('t-'+t.id);crumb.textContent=domName(t.di)+' › 세부 테제';ptitle.textContent=(hubIds.has(t.id)?'🔥 ':'')+t.label;
      const linked=[...adj[t.id]].map(byId).filter(n=>n&&n.kind==='thesis'&&n.di!==t.di);
      let rel='';
      if(linked.length)rel='<div style="padding:2px 8px 12px"><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--sub);margin-bottom:6px">유기적으로 연결된 다른 분야 테제</div>'+linked.slice(0,8).map(n=>`<span class="thchip" data-id="${n.id}">${esc(n.label)}</span>`).join('')+'</div>';
      pcount.textContent=t.posts.length.toLocaleString()+'편의 글';plist.innerHTML=rel+t.posts.map(postHTML).join('');plist.scrollTop=0;bindChips();}
      function bindChips(){plist.querySelectorAll('.thchip').forEach(c=>c.onclick=()=>{const n=byId(c.dataset.id);focusNode(n);});}
      function actBtn(act,ic,u){const on=(act==='read'?READ:act==='later'?LATER:SCRAP).has(u);const tip=act==='later'?'나중에 읽기 (보관함에 저장)':act==='scrap'?'스크랩 (보관함에 저장)':'읽음';return `<button class="pact pact-${act}${on?' on':''}" data-act="${act}" data-u="${esc(u)}" title="${tip}" aria-label="${tip}">${ic}</button>`;}
      function itemHTML(p,sub,rank){const u=p.u;const subline=(sub!=null)?sub:(p.d+(p.v?(' · 조회 '+p.v.toLocaleString()):''));
      return `<div class="pitem${READ.has(u)?' read':(VISITED.has(u)?' seen':'')}"><a class="plink" href="${u}" target="_blank" rel="noopener" data-u="${esc(u)}"><div class="pt">${rank!=null?'<span class=\"rk\">'+rank+'</span>':''}${esc(p.t)}</div><div class="pd">${subline}</div></a><div class="pacts">${actBtn('later','⏰',u)}${actBtn('scrap','🔖',u)}</div></div>`;}
      function postHTML(p){return itemHTML(p);}
      plist.addEventListener('click',e=>{const btn=e.target.closest('.pact');
      if(btn){e.preventDefault();e.stopPropagation();const u=btn.dataset.u,act=btn.dataset.act;
      const s=act==='read'?READ:act==='later'?LATER:SCRAP,k=act==='read'?'mb_read':act==='later'?'mb_later':'mb_scrap';
      toggleSet(s,k,u);btn.classList.toggle('on',s.has(u));
      if(act==='read'){const it=btn.closest('.pitem');if(it)it.classList.toggle('read',READ.has(u));updateLevel();}
      return;}
      const lk=e.target.closest('.plink');if(lk){const u=lk.dataset.u,it=lk.closest('.pitem');
      if(MODE==='study'){startChallenge(u);if(it)it.classList.add('seen');}
      else{VISITED.add(u);saveSet('mb_visited',VISITED);if(it&&!it.classList.contains('read'))it.classList.add('seen');}}});
      const allPosts=[];NODES.forEach(n=>{if(n.kind==='thesis')n.posts.forEach(p=>allPosts.push({t:p.t,u:p.u,d:p.d,v:p.v,di:n.di,th:n.label,tid:n.id}));});
      const searchEl=document.getElementById('search');let stt;
      searchEl.oninput=()=>{clearTimeout(stt);stt=setTimeout(doSearch,140);};
      function runSearch(q){searchEl.value=q;doSearch();}
      function doSearch(){const q=searchEl.value.trim().toLowerCase();if(!q){selId=null;clearHi();closePanel();setHash('');return;}
      const terms=q.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);const mt=s=>terms.every(t=>s.toLowerCase().includes(t));
      const seen={},res=[];for(const p of allPosts){if(mt(p.t)&&!seen[p.u]){seen[p.u]=1;res.push(p);}}res.sort((a,b)=>a.d<b.d?1:-1);
      const hot=new Set();NODES.forEach(n=>{if(n.kind==='thesis'){if(mt(n.label)||(n.posts&&n.posts.some(p=>mt(p.t))))hot.add(n.id);}else if(mt(n.label))hot.add(n.id);});
      selId='__search';highlight(hot.size?hot:new Set());
      openPanel();crumb.textContent='검색';ptitle.textContent='"'+searchEl.value.trim()+'"';
      pcount.textContent=res.length.toLocaleString()+'편(제목 일치) · 그래프 '+hot.size+'개 테제 강조';
      __titleRes=res;__curQ=searchEl.value.trim();__sumRes=[];__fullRes=[];renderSearch();augmentSummary();}
      /* ---- 본문/요약 하이브리드 검색 ---- */
      let __titleRes=[],__sumRes=[],__fullRes=[],__curQ='';
      let SUM=null,SUMBYID=null,FULL=null;
      const MAPBYID={};allPosts.forEach(function(p){var id=pidOf(p.u);if(id&&!MAPBYID[id])MAPBYID[id]=p;});
      function pidOf(u){var m=(u||'').match(/(\d{6,})/);return m?m[1]:'';}
      var __DUP=/([가-힣])\1/g;
      function mbNorm(s){s=(s||'').toLowerCase();var p=null;while(p!==s){p=s;s=s.replace(__DUP,'$1');}return s.replace(/\s+/g,'');}
      function mbTerms(q){return (q||'').toLowerCase().split(/\s+/).map(function(t){return mbNorm(t);}).filter(Boolean);}
      function loadSummary(){if(SUM)return Promise.resolve(SUM);if(window.__sumP)return window.__sumP;window.__sumP=fetch('search-summary.json').then(function(r){return r.json();}).then(function(j){SUM=j.posts;SUMBYID={};SUM.forEach(function(a){SUMBYID[a[0]]={d:a[1],c:a[2],t:a[3],s:a[4],n:mbNorm(a[3]+' '+a[4])};});return SUM;});return window.__sumP;}
      function loadFull(){if(FULL)return Promise.resolve(FULL);if(window.__fullP)return window.__fullP;window.__fullP=fetch('ft-manifest.json').then(function(r){return r.json();}).then(function(m){return Promise.all(m.files.map(function(f){return fetch(f).then(function(r){return r.json();});}));}).then(function(arrs){FULL={};arrs.forEach(function(j){j.posts.forEach(function(a){FULL[a[0]]={b:a[1],n:mbNorm(a[1])};});});return FULL;});return window.__fullP;}
      function searchSummary(){var ts=mbTerms(__curQ);__sumRes=[];if(!ts.length||!SUMBYID)return;var out=[];for(var id in SUMBYID){var o=SUMBYID[id];var ok=true;for(var i=0;i<ts.length;i++){if(o.n.indexOf(ts[i])<0){ok=false;break;}}if(ok)out.push({id:id,date:o.d,cat:o.c,summ:o.s});}out.sort(function(a,b){return a.date<b.date?1:-1;});__sumRes=out.slice(0,200);}
      function searchFull(){var ts=mbTerms(__curQ);__fullRes=[];if(!ts.length||!FULL)return;var out=[];for(var id in FULL){var o=FULL[id];var ok=true;for(var i=0;i<ts.length;i++){if(o.n.indexOf(ts[i])<0){ok=false;break;}}if(ok){var m=SUMBYID&&SUMBYID[id];out.push({id:id,body:o.b,date:m?m.d:'',cat:m?m.c:''});}}out.sort(function(a,b){return a.date<b.date?1:-1;});__fullRes=out.slice(0,300);}
      function psFromIdx(id){var mp=MAPBYID[id];if(mp)return mp;var m=SUMBYID&&SUMBYID[id];return {u:'https://blog.naver.com/bambooinvesting/'+id,t:m?m.t:('글 '+id),d:m?m.d:'',di:0,th:m?m.c:'',v:0};}
      function mbSnip(text,terms){if(!text)return '';var low=text.toLowerCase(),pos=-1;for(var i=0;i<terms.length;i++){var p=low.indexOf(terms[i]);if(p>=0&&(pos<0||p<pos))pos=p;}var st=pos<0?0:Math.max(0,pos-28);var seg=esc(text.slice(st,st+120).trim());for(var j=0;j<terms.length;j++){var t=terms[j];if(!t)continue;seg=seg.replace(new RegExp('('+t.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g,'\\$&')+')','ig'),'<b>$1</b>');}return (st>0?'…':'')+seg+'…';}
      function renderSearch(){var terms=(__curQ||'').toLowerCase().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);var shown={},items=[];
      __titleRes.forEach(function(p){var id=pidOf(p.u);if(id&&!shown[id]){shown[id]=1;items.push(itemHTML(p,p.d+(p.v?' · 조회 '+p.v.toLocaleString():'')+' · '+esc(domName(p.di))+' › '+esc(p.th)+' <span class="mbtag">제목</span>'));}});
      __sumRes.forEach(function(r){if(shown[r.id])return;shown[r.id]=1;items.push(itemHTML(psFromIdx(r.id),esc(r.date)+' · '+esc(r.cat)+' <span class="mbtag">요약</span><div class="msnip">'+mbSnip(r.summ,terms)+'</div>'));});
      __fullRes.forEach(function(r){if(shown[r.id])return;shown[r.id]=1;items.push(itemHTML(psFromIdx(r.id),esc(r.date)+' · '+esc(r.cat)+' <span class="mbtag bdy">본문</span><div class="msnip">'+mbSnip(r.body,terms)+'</div>'));});
      var ttl=Object.keys(shown).length;var bar='<div class="srchbar"><span>'+ttl.toLocaleString()+'편 일치</span>'+(FULL?'<span class="bdone">본문까지 검색됨</span>':'<button id="btnfull">📄 본문 전체로 더 찾기</button>')+'</div>';
      plist.innerHTML=bar+(items.length?items.join(''):'<div style="padding:24px;color:var(--sub);text-align:center">검색 결과가 없습니다.</div>');
      var bf=document.getElementById('btnfull');if(bf)bf.onclick=function(){bf.textContent='본문 불러오는 중…';bf.disabled=true;loadFull().then(function(){if(__curQ){searchFull();renderSearch();}});};}
      function augmentSummary(){var q=__curQ;loadSummary().then(function(){if(__curQ!==q)return;searchSummary();if(FULL)searchFull();renderSearch();}).catch(function(){});}
      /* ---- end hybrid search ---- */
      const KWS=['HBM','엔비디아','삼성전자','트럼프','중국','조선','방산','비트코인','금리','부동산','에이전트','로봇'];
      function chipRow(el){el.innerHTML=KWS.map(k=>`<span class="kw">${k}</span>`).join('');el.querySelectorAll('.kw').forEach((c,i)=>c.onclick=()=>{closeIntro();runSearch(KWS[i]);});}
      chipRow(document.getElementById('kwbar'));
      document.getElementById('introkw').innerHTML=KWS.map(k=>`<span class="kw">${k}</span>`).join('');
      document.getElementById('introkw').querySelectorAll('.kw').forEach((c,i)=>c.onclick=()=>{closeIntro();runSearch(KWS[i]);});
      // 트레일
      function openTrails(){openPanel();setHash('trails');selId='__trail';clearHi();crumb.textContent='추천 경로';ptitle.textContent='📚 추천 읽기 경로';
      pcount.textContent=TRAILS.length+'개 코스 · 순서대로 읽어보세요';
      plist.innerHTML=TRAILS.map((t,i)=>`<a class="tcard" data-i="${i}"><div class="tt">${esc(t.title)}</div><div class="td">${esc(t.desc)} · ${t.items.length}편</div></a>`).join('');
      plist.querySelectorAll('.tcard').forEach(c=>c.onclick=()=>openTrail(+c.dataset.i));}
      function openTrail(i){const t=TRAILS[i];openPanel();setHash('trail-'+i);crumb.innerHTML='<span style="cursor:pointer;color:var(--green)" id="backtr">‹ 추천 경로</span>';
      ptitle.textContent=t.title;pcount.textContent=t.desc;
      plist.innerHTML=t.items.map((p,j)=>itemHTML(p,(p.v?'조회 '+p.v.toLocaleString()+' · ':'')+p.d+' · '+esc(p.th),j+1)).join('');
      plist.scrollTop=0;const b=document.getElementById('backtr');if(b)b.onclick=openTrails;}
      document.getElementById('trailbtn').onclick=()=>{closeIntro();openTrails();};
      document.getElementById('hotbtn').onclick=()=>{closeIntro();openTrail(0);};
      // 랜덤
      function randomThesis(){const ths=NODES.filter(n=>n.kind==='thesis');const n=ths[Math.floor(Math.random()*ths.length)];closeIntro();fit();setTimeout(()=>focusNode(n),200);}
      document.getElementById('dice').onclick=randomThesis;
      // 보관함(나중에 읽기 / 스크랩 / 읽음)
      const POSTBYURL={};allPosts.forEach(function(p){if(!POSTBYURL[p.u])POSTBYURL[p.u]=p;});
      let boxTab='later';
      function openBox(tab){boxTab=tab||boxTab;selId='__box';clearHi();openPanel();
      crumb.textContent='내 보관함';ptitle.textContent='📥 보관함';
      const sets={later:LATER,scrap:SCRAP,read:READ},labels={later:'⏰ 나중에 읽기',scrap:'🔖 스크랩',read:'✓ 읽은 글'};
      pcount.textContent='⏰ '+LATER.size+' · 🔖 '+SCRAP.size+' · ✓ '+READ.size;
      const tabs=Object.keys(labels).map(function(kk){return '<span class="boxtab'+(kk===boxTab?' on':'')+'" data-tab="'+kk+'">'+labels[kk]+'</span>';}).join('');
      const urls=[...sets[boxTab]].filter(function(u){return POSTBYURL[u];});
      const items=urls.map(function(u){return POSTBYURL[u];}).sort(function(a,b){return a.d<b.d?1:-1;});
      let body='<div style="padding:6px 8px 12px">'+tabs+'</div>';
      if(!items.length){body+='<div style="padding:24px 14px;color:var(--sub);text-align:center;font-size:13px;line-height:1.7">'+(boxTab==='later'?'⏰ 나중에 읽을 글이 없습니다.<br>글 옆 ⏰ 버튼으로 담아두세요.':boxTab==='scrap'?'🔖 스크랩한 글이 없습니다.<br>글 옆 🔖 버튼으로 모아두세요.':'✓ 읽은 글이 없습니다.<br>글을 클릭하면 자동으로 기록됩니다.')+'</div>';}
      else{body+=items.map(function(p){return itemHTML(p);}).join('');}
      plist.innerHTML=body;plist.scrollTop=0;
      plist.querySelectorAll('.boxtab').forEach(function(c){c.onclick=function(){openBox(c.dataset.tab);};});}
      document.getElementById('boxbtn').onclick=function(){closeIntro();openBox(boxTab);};
      // 모드(둘러보기/제대로 읽기) + 읽기 도전(체류 2분)
      const GOAL=120000;let active=null,hiddenAt=0;
      const modesw=document.getElementById('modesw'),chEl=document.getElementById('challenge');
      function setMode(m){MODE=m;try{localStorage.setItem('mb_mode',m);}catch(e){}
      modesw.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(function(b){b.classList.toggle('on',b.dataset.mode===m);});
      if(m!=='study'){active=null;}renderChallenge();
      if(m==='study')toast('📖 제대로 읽기: 글을 2분 이상 읽고 돌아오면 완독 인정!');}
      modesw.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(function(b){b.onclick=function(){setMode(b.dataset.mode);};});
      function startChallenge(u){active={u:u,away:0};renderChallenge();}
      function checkChallenge(){if(!active)return;if(active.away>=GOAL)creditRead(active.u);else renderChallenge();}
      function creditRead(u){READ.add(u);VISITED.add(u);saveSet('mb_read',READ);saveSet('mb_visited',VISITED);
      document.querySelectorAll('#plist .plink').forEach(function(lk){if(lk.dataset.u===u){var it=lk.closest('.pitem');if(it){it.classList.remove('seen');it.classList.add('read');}}});
      var p=POSTBYURL[u];active=null;renderChallenge();updateLevel();
      toast('✅ 「'+(p?p.t:'')+'」 완독! 레벨에 반영됐어요');}
      function renderChallenge(){if(MODE!=='study'||!active){chEl.style.display='none';chEl.innerHTML='';return;}
      var p=POSTBYURL[active.u],pct=Math.min(100,Math.round(active.away/GOAL*100)),left=Math.max(0,Math.ceil((GOAL-active.away)/1000));
      chEl.innerHTML='<div class="ch-t">📖 읽기 도전 중</div><div class="ch-s">'+(p?esc(p.t):'')+'<br>'+(left>0?('블로그에서 <b style="color:var(--leaf)">'+left+'초</b> 더 읽고 돌아오면 완독'):'거의 다 됐어요!')+'</div><div class="ch-bar"><div style="width:'+pct+'%"></div></div><div class="ch-btns"><button id="chgo">블로그 다시 열기</button><button id="chcancel" class="gho">취소</button></div>';
      chEl.style.display='block';
      var g=document.getElementById('chgo');if(g)g.onclick=function(){window.open(active.u,'_blank','noopener');};
      var c=document.getElementById('chcancel');if(c)c.onclick=function(){active=null;renderChallenge();};}
      document.addEventListener('visibilitychange',function(){
      if(document.hidden){hiddenAt=Date.now();}
      else{if(active&&hiddenAt)active.away+=Date.now()-hiddenAt;hiddenAt=0;checkChallenge();}});
      setMode(MODE);
      // 게임형 독서 레벨 + 레이더
      const DSHORT=['반도체','AI·SW','AI활용','매크로','기계·방산','산업섹터','암호화폐','부동산','투자철학','사업·삶'];
      const DTITLE=['반도체 통(通)','AI·플랫폼 통','AI 실전가','거시 전략가','중후장대·방산 통','섹터 헌터','크립토 탐험가','부동산 길잡이','투자 철학가','삶·커리어 사색가'];
      const LEVELS=[[0,'대나무 씨앗','🌱'],[5,'죽순','🌿'],[15,'어린 대나무','🎋'],[30,'푸른 대나무','🎍'],[60,'대나무','🌲'],[100,'대나무 숲','🌳'],[180,'모소밤부 마스터','👑']];
      function levelOf(n){let name=LEVELS[0][1],badge=LEVELS[0][2],idx=1;for(let i=0;i<LEVELS.length;i++){if(n>=LEVELS[i][0]){name=LEVELS[i][1];badge=LEVELS[i][2];idx=i+1;}}return {lv:idx,name:name,badge:badge,next:LEVELS[idx]||null};}
      function stats(){const byUrl={};allPosts.forEach(p=>{if(byUrl[p.u]==null)byUrl[p.u]=p.di;});
      const m=PAYLOAD.order.length,tot=new Array(m).fill(0),rd=new Array(m).fill(0);let total=0,read=0;
      for(const u in byUrl){const di=byUrl[u];tot[di]++;total++;if(READ.has(u)){rd[di]++;read++;}}
      return {tot:tot,rd:rd,total:total,read:read};}
      function radarSVG(tot,rd){const n=tot.length,R=86,cx=110,cy=112;let g='';
      [0.25,0.5,0.75,1].forEach(function(rr){let pts='';for(let i=0;i<n;i++){const a=i/n*2*Math.PI-Math.PI/2;pts+=(cx+Math.cos(a)*R*rr)+','+(cy+Math.sin(a)*R*rr)+' ';}g+='<polygon points="'+pts+'" fill="none" stroke="#2a3f22" stroke-width="1"/>';});
      let poly='';for(let i=0;i<n;i++){const a=i/n*2*Math.PI-Math.PI/2;const ratio=tot[i]?rd[i]/tot[i]:0;
      g+='<line x1="'+cx+'" y1="'+cy+'" x2="'+(cx+Math.cos(a)*R)+'" y2="'+(cy+Math.sin(a)*R)+'" stroke="#2a3f22" stroke-width="1"/>';
      poly+=(cx+Math.cos(a)*R*ratio)+','+(cy+Math.sin(a)*R*ratio)+' ';
      const lx=cx+Math.cos(a)*(R+15),ly=cy+Math.sin(a)*(R+15);
      g+='<text x="'+lx+'" y="'+ly+'" font-size="9" fill="#8FA889" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">'+DSHORT[i]+'</text>';}
      g+='<polygon points="'+poly+'" fill="rgba(154,211,107,.32)" stroke="#9AD36B" stroke-width="2"/>';
      return '<svg viewBox="0 0 220 224" width="220" height="224" style="flex:none">'+g+'</svg>';}
      function _mbBackupKeys(){return ['mb_read','mb_later','mb_scrap','mb_visited','mb_mode'];}function exportProgress(){var o={v:1,t:Date.now()};_mbBackupKeys().forEach(function(k){var val=null;try{val=localStorage.getItem(k);}catch(e){}if(val!=null)o[k]=val;});var json=JSON.stringify(o);return 'MBU1:'+btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(json)));}function importProgress(code){code=(code||'').trim();var i=code.indexOf('MBU1:');if(i>=0)code=code.slice(i+5);var o=JSON.parse(decodeURIComponent(escape(atob(code))));if(!o||o.v!==1)throw new Error('형식 오류');['mb_read','mb_later','mb_scrap','mb_visited'].forEach(function(k){if(typeof o[k]==='string'){var inc=[];try{inc=JSON.parse(o[k]);}catch(e){return;}if(!Array.isArray(inc))return;var cur=[];try{cur=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(k)||'[]');}catch(e){}var merged=Array.from(new Set(cur.concat(inc)));try{localStorage.setItem(k,JSON.stringify(merged));}catch(e){}}});if(typeof o.mb_mode==='string'){try{localStorage.setItem('mb_mode',o.mb_mode);}catch(e){}}return true;}
      function openProfile(){const s=stats(),lv=levelOf(s.read);let top=-1,best=-1;
      for(let i=0;i<s.rd.length;i++){if(s.rd[i]>best){best=s.rd[i];top=i;}}
      const pct=s.total?Math.round(s.read/s.total*100):0;
      const nextTxt=lv.next?('다음 「'+lv.next[1]+'」까지 '+(lv.next[0]-s.read)+'편'):'최고 레벨 달성! 🎉';
      let bars='';for(let i=0;i<s.tot.length;i++){const p=s.tot[i]?Math.round(s.rd[i]/s.tot[i]*100):0;
      bars+='<div style="margin:5px 0"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;color:var(--sub)"><span>'+DSHORT[i]+(s.rd[i]>=s.tot[i]&&s.tot[i]>0?' 🏆':'')+'</span><span>'+s.rd[i]+'/'+s.tot[i]+'</span></div><div style="height:6px;background:#1a280f;border-radius:999px;overflow:hidden;margin-top:2px"><div style="height:100%;width:'+p+'%;background:'+(p>=100?'#E0C36B':'#9AD36B')+'"></div></div></div>';}
      document.getElementById('pfbody').innerHTML=
      '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin:2px 0 8px"><div style="width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green);color:#0b110c;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:16px;flex:none;font-size:27px;line-height:1">'+lv.badge+'</div>'
      +'<div><div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:var(--leaf)">Lv.'+lv.lv+' · '+lv.name+'</div><div style="font-size:12.5px;color:var(--sub);margin-top:2px">'+(best>0?('주력 분야 · <b style="color:var(--green)">'+DTITLE[top]+'</b>'):'아직 읽은 글이 없어요 — 글을 눌러 탐험을 시작하세요')+'</div></div></div>'
      +'<div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--ink);margin:6px 0 4px">전체 진행도 <b>'+s.read+'</b> / '+s.total+'편 ('+pct+'%) · <span style="color:var(--sub)">'+nextTxt+'</span></div>'
      +'<div style="height:9px;background:#1a280f;border-radius:999px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:8px"><div style="height:100%;width:'+pct+'%;background:var(--green)"></div></div>'
      +'<div style="display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center">'+radarSVG(s.tot,s.rd)+'<div style="flex:1;min-width:210px">'+bars+'</div></div>'
      +'<div style="margin-top:14px;border-top:1px solid var(--panelb);padding-top:10px"><div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--sub);margin-bottom:6px">레벨 체계</div>'+LEVELS.map(function(L,i){var cur=(i+1)===lv.lv;return '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:4px 6px;border-radius:8px;'+(cur?'background:#1b2a10;':'')+'"><span style="font-size:15px">'+L[2]+'</span><span style="font-size:12.5px;font-weight:'+(cur?'800':'600')+';color:'+(cur?'var(--leaf)':'var(--ink)')+'">Lv.'+(i+1)+' '+L[1]+'</span><span style="margin-left:auto;font-size:11px;color:var(--sub)">'+L[0]+'편+</span>'+(cur?'<span style="color:var(--green);font-weight:700;font-size:11px;margin-left:6px">← 현재</span>':'')+'</div>';}).join('')+'</div>'+'<div style="margin-top:14px;border-top:1px solid var(--panelb);padding-top:12px">'+'<div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--sub);margin-bottom:8px">📦 다른 기기(폰↔PC)로 진행기록 옮기기</div>'+'<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap">'+'<button id="pfexport" style="flex:1;min-width:130px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:700;padding:9px 12px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--panelb);background:#14200f;color:var(--leaf)">📤 백업 코드 복사</button>'+'<button id="pfimport" style="flex:1;min-width:130px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:700;padding:9px 12px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--panelb);background:#14200f;color:var(--leaf)">📥 코드로 복원</button>'+'</div></div>'+'<div style="margin-top:12px;font-size:11px;color:var(--sub);display:flex;justify-content:space-between"><span>진행도는 이 브라우저에 자동 저장됩니다</span><span id="pfreset" style="cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline">기록 초기화</span></div>';
      document.getElementById('profile').style.display='flex';
      var ex=document.getElementById('pfexport');if(ex)ex.onclick=function(){var code=exportProgress();if(navigator.clipboard&&navigator.clipboard.writeText){navigator.clipboard.writeText(code).then(function(){toast('📤 백업 코드를 복사했어요 — 메모장 등에 보관하세요');}).catch(function(){window.prompt('아래 백업 코드를 전체 복사해 보관하세요',code);});}else{window.prompt('아래 백업 코드를 전체 복사해 보관하세요',code);}};
      var im=document.getElementById('pfimport');if(im)im.onclick=function(){var code=window.prompt('다른 기기에서 복사한 백업 코드를 붙여넣으세요');if(!code)return;try{importProgress(code);toast('✅ 복원 완료 — 새로고침합니다');setTimeout(function(){location.reload();},900);}catch(e){alert('복원 실패: 코드 형식이 올바른지 확인해주세요.');}};
      const rs=document.getElementById('pfreset');if(rs)rs.onclick=function(){if(confirm('읽음 기록을 모두 지울까요?')){READ.clear();try{localStorage.removeItem('mb_read');}catch(e){}document.querySelectorAll('.pitem.read').forEach(function(el){el.classList.remove('read');});updateLevel();openProfile();}};}
      function updateLevel(){const lv=levelOf(stats().read);const b=document.getElementById('levelbtn');if(b)b.innerHTML=lv.badge+'<span> 레벨 '+lv.lv+'</span>';}
      document.getElementById('levelbtn').onclick=function(){closeIntro();openProfile();};
      document.getElementById('pfclose').onclick=function(){document.getElementById('profile').style.display='none';};
      document.getElementById('profile').onclick=function(e){if(e.target.id==='profile')document.getElementById('profile').style.display='none';};
      updateLevel();
      // 공유/복사
      function toast(m){const t=document.getElementById('toast');t.textContent=m;t.classList.add('show');setTimeout(()=>t.classList.remove('show'),1800);}
      document.getElementById('share').onclick=()=>{const u=location.href;
      if(navigator.clipboard&&navigator.clipboard.writeText){navigator.clipboard.writeText(u).then(()=>toast('🔗 이 화면 링크가 복사되었습니다')).catch(()=>toast(u));}
      else{prompt('이 링크를 복사하세요',u);}};
      // 줌
      document.getElementById('zin').onclick=()=>svg.transition().call(zoom.scaleBy,1.3);
      document.getElementById('zout').onclick=()=>svg.transition().call(zoom.scaleBy,.77);
      document.getElementById('zfit').onclick=()=>fit();
      function fit(dur){if(dur==null)dur=500;var xs=NODES.map(function(n){return n.x;}),ys=NODES.map(function(n){return n.y;});var minx=Math.min.apply(0,xs),maxx=Math.max.apply(0,xs),miny=Math.min.apply(0,ys),maxy=Math.max.apply(0,ys);var cx=(minx+maxx)/2,cy=(miny+maxy)/2,bw=(maxx-minx)||1,bh=(maxy-miny)||1,pad=80;var k=Math.min((W-pad*2)/bw,(H-pad*2)/bh);k=Math.max(0.25,Math.min(k,1));var tr=d3.zoomIdentity.translate(W/2,H/2).scale(k).translate(-cx,-cy);if(dur)svg.transition().duration(dur).call(zoom.transform,tr);else svg.call(zoom.transform,tr);}
      // 인트로
      const intro=document.getElementById('intro');
      function closeIntro(){intro.style.display='none';try{localStorage.setItem('mb_seen','1');}catch(e){}}
      /* 인트로는 매 방문 표시 */
      document.getElementById('goexplore').onclick=closeIntro;
      document.getElementById('gotrail').onclick=()=>{closeIntro();openTrail(0);};
      document.getElementById('godice').onclick=randomThesis;
      // 저작권
      const modal=document.getElementById('modal');
      document.getElementById('liclink').onclick=()=>modal.style.display='flex';
      document.getElementById('mclose').onclick=()=>modal.style.display='none';
      modal.onclick=e=>{if(e.target===modal)modal.style.display='none';};
      function esc(s){return (''+s).replace(/[&<>"]/g,c=>({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;'}[c]));}
      function setHash(h){try{history.replaceState(null,'',h?('#'+h):location.pathname+location.search);}catch(e){}}
      function applyHash(){const h=decodeURIComponent(location.hash.replace(/^#/,''));if(!h)return;
      closeIntro();
      if(h==='trails'){openTrails();return;}
      if(h.indexOf('trail-')===0){openTrail(+h.slice(6));return;}
      if(h.indexOf('t-')===0||h.indexOf('d-')===0){const n=byId(h.slice(2));if(n){fit();setTimeout(()=>focusNode(n),250);}}}
      addEventListener('resize',()=>{W=stage.clientWidth;H=stage.clientHeight;sim.force('x',d3.forceX(W/2).strength(.022)).force('y',d3.forceY(H/2).strength(.022));sim.alpha(.2).restart();});
      (function(){const b=document.getElementById('bg-bamboo'),NS='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg';
      const E=(t,a)=>{const e=document.createElementNS(NS,t);for(const k in a)e.setAttribute(k,a[k]);return e;};
      [{x:90,c:'#3c5a30',w:14},{x:1110,c:'#46683a',w:12},{x:1040,c:'#33502b',w:9},{x:165,c:'#3a5a2f',w:8}].forEach(co=>{
      b.appendChild(E('line',{x1:co.x,y1:0,x2:co.x,y2:800,stroke:co.c,'stroke-width':co.w,'stroke-opacity':.5}));
      for(let k=0;k<7;k++){const yy=40+k*120;b.appendChild(E('line',{x1:co.x-co.w,y1:yy,x2:co.x+co.w,y2:yy,stroke:co.c,'stroke-width':3,'stroke-opacity':.6}));
      b.appendChild(E('path',{d:`M${co.x+co.w} ${yy+10} q40 -6 60 16 q-46 6 -60 -16z`,fill:co.c,'fill-opacity':.3}));}});})();
      setTimeout(()=>{fit(0);applyHash();},60);
      </script>
      </body>
      </html>
